name: the classifier tags a Terraform rule to the terraform IaC dialect
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-rule.sh" --title 'No open ingress' --prose 'Terraform resource blocks in .tf must not allow 0.0.0.0/0.' --json > c.json 2>e.txt; node -e 'const c=require(process.cwd()+"/c.json");if(!c.applies_to.iac_dialects.includes("terraform"))process.exit(1)' && echo tf-classified 1>&2
